title: Company Names Tribunal decision: P&O Procurements Limited
body: "Application number 5530  Applicant The Peninsular and Oriental Steam Navigation Company objected to the name used by P&O Procurements Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal. "
